cta.title: Start automating
cta.description: Connect your Vinted and eBay accounts to start automating your listings.

publish.title: Publish with AI
publish.subtitle: Add up to 6 photos of your item, AI handles the rest.
publish.dropzone: Drag your photos or click to choose
publish.dropzone_hint: Up to 6 images · PNG, JPG, WEBP
publish.listing_subtitle: Review and complete the automatically generated information
publish.connect_account_first: Connect a Vinted or eBay account to publish
publish.select_account_to_generate: Please select at least one account to generate your listing

connections.title: Connections
connections.subtitle: Manage your Vinted and eBay merchant accounts.

modal.vinted_desc: Vinted will open in a new tab. Sign in to your account and the Fuki extension will sync everything automatically.
modal.ebay_desc: You will be redirected to eBay to securely connect your store.
modal.waiting_desc: Sign in to Vinted in the opened tab, then come back here. Fuki will detect the connection automatically.

delete.title: Disconnect account?
delete.subtitle: This action is irreversible
delete.description: will be removed from Fuki. You can reconnect it anytime.

toast.vinted_opened: Vinted opened — sign in then come back here.
toast.token_error: Unable to generate token. Try again.

listings.title: My listings
listings.subtitle: Track the status of your publications.
listings.empty_subtitle: Publish your first item with AI.
